# Decision Log (DTF Re-baseline 2026-02-06)

## D-001: Keep strict DTF isolation
- Decision: All new functional changes are limited to `twocomms/dtf/*` and DTF routing hooks (`urls_dtf`, subdomain middleware).
- Why: User requirement is to treat `dtf.twocomms.shop` as a separate site and avoid touching main storefront behavior.

## D-002: DTF sitemap/robots are host-aware and generated by DTF app
- Decision: `dtf.views.robots_txt` and `dtf.views.sitemap_xml` are authoritative for DTF host; `/prices/` permanently redirects to `/price/`.
- Why: This guarantees DTF-specific indexing and canonical path behavior.

## D-003: Upload security without extra system dependencies
- Decision: Implement validation in DTF forms via extension allowlist, MIME check, magic-byte sniffing and file-size limit, with random safe filenames.
- Why: Provides server-side protection while remaining compatible with current hosting constraints.

## D-004: P1 improvements are applied only in DTF template/CSS
- Decision: LCP/CLS hardening (hero preload/fetchpriority/dimensions), sticky overlap mitigation, and on-light accent token are implemented only in DTF assets.
- Why: Meet checklist goals without altering main site design system.
